hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty"); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in */backend/*.py) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/backend" && out=$(uv run ruff check "$f" 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; */frontend/*.ts|*/frontend/*.tsx) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/frontend" && out=$(npx oxlint --deny-warnings "$f" 2>&1) || { echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; };; esac; exit 0
